tasks.subject: Task 1: pkg/breezy.SetTimer op + tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Library-level function that writes the timer mode byte to 0x0007. Mirrors SetHeater.

**Files:**
- Modify: `pkg/breezy/ops.go` (after SetHeater, around line 87)
- Modify: `pkg/breezy/ops_test.go` (after TestOps_SetHeater)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- SetTimer accepts off/night/turbo (case-insensitive), writes 0x0007 with byte 0/1/2
- Unknown modes return ErrInvalidArg, no write emitted

**Verify:** `go test ./pkg/breezy/ -run TestOps_SetTimer -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pkg/breezy/ops.go", "pkg/breezy/ops_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test ./pkg/breezy/ -run TestOps_SetTimer -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["SetTimer writes 0x0007 with mode byte", "Bad mode returns ErrInvalidArg"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Add 0x0007 to fanWriteIDs
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Apply existing 12s fan-settle suppression window to timer writes.

**Files:**
- Modify: `cmd/breezyd/poller.go:34-38`
- Modify: `cmd/breezyd/poller_test.go:389-419`

**Verify:** `go test ./cmd/breezyd/ -run TestPoller_NoticeWrite -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["cmd/breezyd/poller.go", "cmd/breezyd/poller_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test ./cmd/breezyd/ -run TestPoller_NoticeWrite -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["0x0007 in fanWriteIDs", "Existing non-fan test uses 0x0068", "New positive test for 0x0007 passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: POST /v1/devices/{name}/timer handler
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Daemon endpoint mirroring postHeater. Cache + fan-settle notice via dialRecording.

**Files:**
- Modify: `cmd/breezyd/handlers_device.go`
- Modify: `cmd/breezyd/server.go:209`
- Modify: `cmd/breezyd/server_test.go`

**Verify:** `go test ./cmd/breezyd/ -run TestHandler_PostTimer -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["cmd/breezyd/handlers_device.go", "cmd/breezyd/server.go", "cmd/breezyd/server_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test ./cmd/breezyd/ -run TestHandler_PostTimer -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Round-trip works", "Bad mode 400", "Missing mode 400"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: CLI verb breezy <name> timer
tasks.description:
**Goal:** CLI verb in both daemon and standalone modes.

**Files:**
- Modify: `cmd/breezy/backend.go`
- Modify: `cmd/breezy/commands.go`
- Modify: `cmd/breezy/main.go`

**Verify:** `go test ./cmd/breezy/ -v && go build ./...`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["cmd/breezy/backend.go", "cmd/breezy/commands.go", "cmd/breezy/main.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test ./cmd/breezy/ -v && go build ./...", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Timer in interface and both backends", "cmdTimer with usage validation", "Help text updated"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Update screenshot fixture and regenerate PNGs
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Make Timer row visible in README screenshot.

**Files:**
- Modify: `tests/ui/screenshot.ts`
- Regenerate: `tests/ui/screenshots/dashboard-3col.png`, `tests/ui/screenshots/dashboard-1col.png`

**Verify:** `just screenshot && git diff --stat tests/ui/screenshots/`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tests/ui/screenshot.ts", "tests/ui/screenshots/dashboard-3col.png", "tests/ui/screenshots/dashboard-1col.png"], "verifyCommand": "just screenshot", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Snapshot has timer fields", "PNGs regenerated", "Timer row visible in 3-col"]}
```
